title: astrephia interrupta
intro: Astrephia interrupta, also known as the mountain aster, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily as an anti-inflammatory agent and to treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Astrephia interrupta include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain, making it a valuable remedy in traditional herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to make a tea or infusion, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
